# Jan 31 2013 at 12:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1635121424099
Scholar
26 posts
I tried most of the zones on this list. I found the best drop rates in Sol. A of the fire goblins, and in Blightfire Moors off the Mucktail Miners.

1,308 posts
Drop off burly kobold and greater kobold shaman, Stonebrunt mountains, I've been here 35 minutes and got 10 pieces.

# Apr 22 2009 at 11:44 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1690762596291
Sage
1,308 posts
Saw 1....one....after about 100 burynai excavators in Kurn's tower.

Saw about 10 at the recondite camp in paludal, after clearing about 6 tents...seems pretty common. - Recondite pickpocket & recondite deceiver, recondite burglar.

▲ Page top
Drops in Permafrost
QuoteReply
# Oct 06 2007 at 8:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593374752573
Scholar
30 posts
It seems that Permafrost is a great place for drops for Tier 4 new cultural, which makes the Simple DoN armor. I got plate/chain, leather, and silk drops from there, both the primary (ore, animal pelts, silk) and secondary components (loam, marrow, spinneret fluid).

I was also getting Tier 3 drops there.
